name: Sky
label: Sky
description:
Controls everything overhead — the sky background that fills the
horizon, the ambient light it casts on the scene, and the global
wind that drives clouds, cloth, and particle systems. Presets
bundle these into named looks like *Skymap*, *Procedural*,
*Indoor*, *Thin Cloud*, and *Cloudy*.


## Mode

**Mode** picks one of three sky renderers and the rest of the
panel reshapes to match. *Color* paints a flat gradient sky
from the **Sky Color** / **Middle Color** / **Ground Color**
values and is the cheapest option. *Sky Map* wraps a 360°
panorama (built-in or imported) around the scene — use this
for outdoor or stylized backgrounds. *Procedural* renders a
physically-based sky and (on HDRP) is the only mode that
supports volumetric clouds.


## Sky Map and Orientation

When mode is *Sky Map*, **Sky Map** chooses the panorama from
the built-in set plus anything imported into the content
library. Loading large skymaps is asynchronous so the UI stays
responsive. **Orientation** rotates the sky in degrees around
the vertical axis — this also rotates the projection used for
the ground sky-dome material, so adjusting it shifts ground
reflections too.


## Background and Ambient

**Background** (HDRP) scales how bright the sky looks on
screen. **Sky Ambient** controls how much that sky bleeds
into the rest of the scene as ambient lighting — lower it
if a bright skymap is washing out actor shading. On URP the
same role is played by **Sky Exposure** and **Intensity**,
where Sky Exposure also feeds reflection probe brightness.


## Sky Colors

In *Color* mode, **Sky Color**, **Middle Color**, and
**Ground Color** define the top, horizon, and bottom of a
three-band gradient. They also drive trilight ambient
lighting (and on HDRP, the fog albedo), so changing them
tints what the scene picks up from the sky in addition to
the visible background.


## Wind

**Wind** sets a global wind speed that drives cloth
simulation, particle dynamics, and (on HDRP) volumetric
cloud movement. **Wind Direction** sets its compass heading.
Keep this modest — high wind speeds make hair and skirts
visibly thrash.


## Wind Field

A localized wind volume on top of the global wind, useful
for staged effects like a fan blowing on one actor. Toggle
it on, then position and orient the cylindrical field with
**Position** / **Rotation** (an interactive gizmo appears
while the menu is open). **Distance** is the cylinder's
length, **Radius** its width, and **Speed** its strength.
Affects cloth and particles inside the volume only.


## Clouds (HDRP)

Volumetric clouds, available only in *Procedural* mode. The
**Toggle** turns them on. **Shape Scale** and **Shape
Factor** control the large-scale silhouette; **Erosion
Scale** and **Erosion Factor** add the wispy edge detail;
**Density** controls overall coverage. **Shadow** projects
cloud shadows onto the scene — costly but adds a lot of
realism on outdoor stages. **Wind Multiplier** scales the
global wind for clouds only, so they can drift faster or
slower than the rest of the scene.

values.name: Mode
values.label: Mode
values.description: Selects the sky rendering mode: Color, Sky Map, or Procedural.

descriptions.ja: 空のレンダリングモードを選択します：色、スカイマップ、またはプロシージャル。
descriptions.zh-TW: 選擇天空渲染模式：顏色、天空貼圖或程序化。
descriptions.ko: 스카이 렌더링 모드를 선택합니다: 색상, 스카이 맵 또는 프로시저.
descriptions.zh-CN: 选择天空渲染模式：颜色、天空贴图或程序化。

values.name: Background
values.label: Background
values.description: Controls the brightness of the sky when it is rendered.

descriptions.ja: レンダリングされたとき、空の明るさを制御します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 控制渲染時天空的亮度。

values.name: Sky Ambient
values.label: Sky Ambient
values.description: Controls how much the sky affects ambient lighting.

descriptions.ja: 空が環境光にどの程度影響するかを制御します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 控制天空影響環境光的程度。
descriptions.ko: 하늘이 앰비언트 조명에 영향을 미치는 정도를 제어합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 控制天空对环境光的影响程度。

values.name: Orientation
values.label: Orientation
values.description: Sets the rotation of the sky in degrees.

descriptions.ja: 空の回転を度数で設定します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 以度為單位設定天空的旋轉角度。

values.name: Wind
values.label: Wind
values.description: Global wind speed affecting cloth simulation, particle dynamics, and clouds.

descriptions.ja: 布シミュレーション、パーティクルのダイナミクス、および雲に影響を与えるグローバルな風速。
descriptions.zh-TW: 影響布料模擬、粒子動態和雲的全局風速。
descriptions.ko: 천체 시뮬레이션, 입자 역학 및 구름에 영향을 미치는 전역 바람 속도.
descriptions.zh-CN: 影响布料模拟、粒子动态和云朵的全局风速。

values.name: Wind Direction
values.label: Wind Direction
values.description: Sets the global wind direction in degrees.

descriptions.ja: グローバルな風の方向を度数で設定します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 以度為單位設定全局風向。

values.name: Wind Field
values.label: Wind Field
values.description: Configures the wind field, including position, rotation, radius, and speed.

descriptions.ja: (Configures the wind field, including position, rotation, radius, and speed.)
descriptions.zh-TW: (Configures the wind field, including position, rotation, radius, and speed.)
descriptions.ko: (Configures the wind field, including position, rotation, radius, and speed.)
descriptions.zh-CN: (Configures the wind field, including position, rotation, radius, and speed.)

values.name: Position
values.label: Position
values.description: Sets the position of the wind field.

descriptions.ja: 風の場の位置を設定します。

values.name: Rotation
values.label: Rotation
values.description: Sets the rotation of the wind field.

descriptions.ja: 風の場の回転を設定します。

values.name: Distance
values.label: Distance
values.description: Sets the distance of the wind field.

descriptions.ja: 風の場の距離を設定します。

values.name: Radius
values.label: Radius
values.description: Sets the radius of the wind field.

descriptions.ja: 風の場の半径を設定します。

values.name: Speed
values.label: Speed
values.description: Sets the speed of the wind field.

descriptions.ja: 風の場の速度を設定します。

values.name: Use Stage Color
values.label: Use Stage Color
values.description: Use the color from the stage ring

descriptions.ja: ステージリングの色を使用

values.name: Use Stage Color
values.label: Use Stage Color
values.description: Use the color from the stage ring

descriptions.ja: ステージリングの色を使用

values.name: Use Stage Color
values.label: Use Stage Color
values.description: Use the color from the stage ring

descriptions.ja: ステージリングの色を使用

values.name: Cloud
values.label: Cloud
values.description: Configures volumetric clouds, including shape, erosion, density, and wind effects.

descriptions.ja: (Configures volumetric clouds, including shape, erosion, density, and wind effects.)
descriptions.zh-TW: (Configures volumetric clouds, including shape, erosion, density, and wind effects.)
descriptions.ko: (Configures volumetric clouds, including shape, erosion, density, and wind effects.)
descriptions.zh-CN: (Configures volumetric clouds, including shape, erosion, density, and wind effects.)

values.name: Shape Scale
values.label: Shape Scale
values.description: Controls the scale of the cloud shapes.

descriptions.ja: 雲の形状のスケールを制御します。

values.name: Shape Factor
values.label: Shape Factor
values.description: Adjusts the shape factor of the clouds.

descriptions.ja: 雲のシェイプファクターを調整します。

values.name: Erosion Scale
values.label: Erosion Scale

labels.ja: エロージョンスケール

values.description: Controls the scale of cloud erosion.

descriptions.ja: 雲のエロージョンのスケールを制御します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 控制雲朵風化程度的縮放。

values.name: Erosion Factor
values.label: Erosion Factor

labels.ja: エロージョンファクター

values.description: Adjusts the erosion factor of the clouds.

descriptions.ja: 雲のエロージョンファクターを調整します。

values.name: Density
values.label: Density
values.description: Sets the density multiplier for the clouds.

descriptions.ja: 雲の密度倍率を設定します。

values.name: Shadow
values.label: Shadow
values.description: Enables or disables cloud shadows.

descriptions.ja: 雲の影を有効化または無効化します。

values.name: Wind Multiplier
values.label: Wind Multiplier
values.description: Sets the wind multiplier for cloud movement.

descriptions.ja: 雲の動きのための風の乗数を設定します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 設定雲移動的風力乘數。
descriptions.ko: 구름 움직임을 위한 바람 증폭률을 설정합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 设置云移动的风力乘数。
